EXPORT CAPABILITY

Engineered in India. Prepared for global industrial requirements.

Dynalektric supplies magnetics, DC power systems, control panels and engineered assemblies with structured documentation, testing coordination and export support for international industrial buyers.

IMS 9001 : 14001 : 45001HeldIEC-aligned product designStandard practiceInspection and FAT supportSupportedExport documentation readinessAvailable based on requirement
Global reach

Global Reach & Industries Served

Dynalektric supports industrial customers across multiple regions and sectors with engineered products and export coordination.

Regions served
North AmericaEU / EEAGCC and Middle EastAfricaSoutheast AsiaAustralia and New Zealand
Industries served
RailwaysPower and utilitiesInfrastructureData centresSemiconductorHeavy industriesMaterial handling

Trust and verification

Trust & Verification

Legal identity, independent verification and financial readiness for procurement onboarding. Values shown as placeholders are confirmed with client-approved data.

Legal identity
Company legal nameAwaiting client-approved value
CINAwaiting client-approved value
GSTAwaiting client-approved value

D-U-N-S numberProvided if available on request
Financial readiness
Bank referenceAvailable on request
Transaction methodsSubject to quotation and order terms
Customer referencesApproved references shared on qualification
Social proof

Certifications and standards

Certifications and Standards

A three-status view across management systems and product or market standards. Status reflects current position and is confirmed with certificate references on request.

HeldCompliedIn ProgressAvailable based on requirement

Management systems

StandardStatusProduct groupRegionCertificate / dates

Certificate reference and validity provided on request.

StandardStatusProduct groupRegionCertificate / dates
IEC 60076Power transformersCompliedMagneticsAllReference on request
Products designed and routine / type tested to this standard.

Evaluated based on product, directive and destination.
ULNorth American safetyAvailable based on requirementPer productNorth AmericaReference on request
Evaluated based on product and order requirement.

Evaluated based on rolling-stock requirement.

Only currently held certifications are displayed as held. Additional market approvals are evaluated based on product, destination and order requirements. Certificate numbers and validity dates are provided on request and verification.

Destination-market clearance

Destination Market Clearance Schemes

Select a destination country and product group to view a likely compliance path. Schemes shown are indicative and confirmed per product and order.

1. Destination country
2. Product group
3. Likely compliance path

Magnetics into USA

North America
  1. 01Applicable UL / NRTL product safety requirements reviewed
  2. 02Product testing and certification route confirmed where required
  3. 03Technical documentation and test evidence prepared for review
  4. 04Importer and customer compliance requirements confirmed

Destination-market requirements are reviewed based on product category, intended application, destination country and importer responsibilities. Final approval remains subject to the relevant authority and conformity process. We do not guarantee customs clearance or automatic acceptance.

Testing support
  • ›ISO / IEC 17025 laboratory reports, where accepted
  • ›IECEE CB scheme reports, where applicable
  • ›Local testing requirements depend on product, market and importer responsibilities
Capability overview

Export Capability Overview

Structured quality systems, trade compliance processes and sustainability readiness support international customer requirements.

  • ›In-house engineering
  • ›Cross-functional engineering teams
  • ›Capacity planning
  • ›DFMEA discipline
  • ›First-Time-Right approach
  • ›Digital production tracking
  • ›Product traceability
  • ›Inspection checkpoints
  • ›Calibration controls
  • ›Documented quality review
Inspection

We welcome customer inspection, third-party inspection and Factory Acceptance Tests based on agreed project requirements.

From RFQ to after-sales

Export Process Journey

Eight structured steps across four phases — from initial enquiry to delivery and after-sales support.

01Enquiry & Proposal
01.1Technical Review

Customer drawings, application requirements and compliance expectations reviewed.

  • Drawings review
  • Technical clarification
  • Customer discussions
01.2Commercial Proposal

Commercial offer prepared with delivery schedule, Incoterms and lead time commitments.

  • Commercial offer
  • Incoterms
  • Lead time estimation
02Engineering & Production
02.1Engineering & Manufacturing

Design, planning and manufacturing executed for the confirmed order.

  • Transformers
  • Control Panels
  • Battery Chargers
  • Custom assemblies
02.2Testing & FAT

Routine quality tests and Factory Acceptance Tests conducted before dispatch.

  • Routine tests
  • Factory Acceptance Test
  • Third-party inspection
03Documentation & Logistics
03.1Documentation

Export documentation prepared and verified for international shipment compliance.

  • Packing List
  • Commercial Invoice
  • Certificate of Origin
  • Test Certificates
03.2Shipping & Customs

Export clearance and freight coordination managed end-to-end.

  • Export clearance
  • Freight coordination
  • Customs support
04Delivery & Support
04.1Delivery

Shipment dispatched on schedule with material handling and customer coordination.

  • On-time shipment
  • Material handling
  • Customer coordination
04.2After-Sales Support

Technical assistance, spare part guidance and responsive customer communication post-delivery.

  • Technical support
  • Spare assistance
  • Customer communication

Indicative sequence. Specific milestones are aligned with customer project requirements and confirmed at order.

Documentation, logistics and support

Resources

Documentation packages, Incoterms, logistics support and after-sales terms for international orders.

Standard documents
  • ›Commercial Invoice
  • ›Packing List
  • ›Shipping Bill
  • ›Bill of Lading or Airway Bill
  • ›Certificate of Origin
Applicable documents
  • ›Product test report
  • ›Certificate of Conformity
  • ›MSDS
  • ›Warranty certificate
  • ›Inspection record
  • ›FAT documentation
Supported Incoterms
EXWFOBCIFDAPDDP

Final Incoterms, payment terms and delivery responsibilities are confirmed in the quotation.

Logistics support
  • ›Export-grade packing
  • ›Product identification and labelling
  • ›Container-loading coordination
  • ›Freight-forwarder coordination
  • ›Dispatch tracking
  • ›Indicative lead time by product family

Indicative lead time is shared by product family. Fixed dates are confirmed at order.

  • ›Warranty terms confirmed per order
  • ›Remote support
  • ›On-site commissioning, where agreed
  • ›Spares availability
  • ›Structured complaint resolution process
Common questions

Frequently Asked Questions

MOQ depends on product group and configuration. Engineered items are quoted per requirement; component items may carry a batch minimum. Confirmed in the quotation.

Yes. Magnetics, panels and power electronics are engineered to application. Share ratings, standards and interfaces and the engineering team reviews feasibility.

Currently held certifications are listed in the certifications matrix. Destination-market approvals such as SASO, G-Mark, SONCAP and PVoC are reviewed per product and country during quotation.

Transaction methods and payment terms are confirmed in the quotation, subject to order value, destination and Incoterms.

Indicative lead time is shared by product family during quotation. Fixed dates are confirmed at order, after specification freeze and inspection planning.

We support customer inspection, third-party inspection and FAT against an agreed inspection plan with defined hold and witness points.

Product category, application and load profile, destination market and standards, quantity, and documentation or inspection scope. One supporting document can be attached.

Application-specific datasheets are provided on request per sub-category. Request them with your RFQ or supplier qualification.

Magnetics, control panels, power electronics and cross-segment components. Engineered in India for industrial, power, railway, renewable and material handling applications worldwide.
